RegLoan Bank — Income / Bank Statement Verification Document VER-0003 Page 5 of 5 Statement of Account — continued Date Description Debit ($) Credit ($) Balance ($) 06/08/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 232 - 1,859 13/07/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT - 651 2,510 20/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 1,844 4,354 04/08/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 365 4,719 23/02/2025 ACH PAYROLL DEPOSIT 202 - 4,517 02/08/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT 483 - 4,034 06/06/2025 ONLINE TRANSFER TO SAVINGS ACCT - - 4,034 13/08/2025 POS PURCHASE GROCERY 244 181 3,971 15/05/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - 1,497 5,468 13/05/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 191 - 5,277 28/10/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - 263 5,540 24/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL 156 - 5,384 26/12/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT - - 5,384 23/01/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 5,384 21/02/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 5,384 14/02/2025 ATM WITHDRAWAL - - 5,384 06/10/2025 AUTO LOAN PMT 225 - 5,159 02/09/2025 UTILITY BILL - - 5,159 OK
